titleStmt.title: SII 10.289: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 289. (A.R. No. 65 of 1917.) ON A NANDI PILLAR SET UP NEAR A TANK, AT BĒJĀTPURAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 11[6]0.

summary.p: States that Prōle-Nāyaka, lord of Poḍvupura and minister of Kōṭa Gaṇapatidēva consecrated the images of Rāmēśvara and Gaṇē[śvara] at Pulipāḍu and built temples for the said deities and for goddess Brōsinamma and had four tanks dug, that his younger brother consecrated the images of Kēśavadēva and Kuppavināyaka and built temples for them and that both of them granted lands to temple priests.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1160 nēṁṭi Uttarāya ṇa
saṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara kōṭagaṇapatidēvamahārā
jula mahāpradhāni poḍvu purava
rādhīśvuruṁ ḍaina śrīmatuddaṁḍanāya
ka prōlenāyakuṁḍu damataṁḍri Uddaṁḍḍanāya
kunakuṁ dama talli guṁḍḍasānkidama Anna daṁ
ḍḍanāyakakētināyakunakun dhammā¨rttha
mmugāṁ bulipāṭi śrīrāmīśvaradēva
ranu pratiṣṭhasēyiṁcci guḍi Ettiṁcci gaṇē
niṁ bratiṣṭhasēsi guḍi Ettiṁcci kumā
rasvāmidēvara guḍiṁ brōsinammaguḍi nettiṁ
cci cceṟvulu nālguṁ gaṭṭiṁccina vāṁḍḍu vīni tammu
dhāsināyakuṁḍu gēsavadēvaraṁ brati
ṣṭajēyiṁcci guḍi Ettiṁcci kuppavinā yakuniṁ brati
ṣṭacēyiṁcci guḍi Ettiṁccinavāṁḍu vīri Aṁddari
naṁ beṭṭiṁcina dēvabrāhmaṇavrittulu śrīrā mīśva
ku nivēdyabhūmi kha3 Īsthānapati pōte Anna
peddikoḍku muvvanaku kha3 cikkaya
varaku nivēdyabhūmi khā dēvanapeddiki khā
nā0 nīrina ma¨rttū
Digital edition of SII 10.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
